posts.author: TruthSeeker99
posts.text: BREAKING: The government has officially confirmed that all vaccines cause immediate death and contain microchips. They are hiding this in secret files! Read the leaked documents at news-site-fake.com to save your life before they delete it.
posts.explanation: This post promotes a clear, demonstrably false claim linking vaccines to death and microchips, which constitutes harmful misinformation that violates platform policy regarding health claims. The link directs users to a fabricated 'leaked' document source, making the content obviously deceptive and requiring removal.
